movesList.name: Story
movesList.input: - At the beginning of each Chronicle, you'll be given a story about

movesList.name: Field
movesList.input: - This is where the actual battles occur. You'll be given certain

movesList.name: Results
movesList.input: - After successfully clearing each Chronicle, you'll be taken to a

movesList.name: Bonus
movesList.input: - Many of the Bonus Characters make their appearances in this mode.

movesList.name: Classes
movesList.input: - There are initially 6 different job classes you can assign to your

movesList.name: Ice
movesList.input: - An advanced form of Slippery, effects all

movesList.name: Glue
movesList.input: - You are constantly pulled towards opponent

movesList.name: Down Lose
movesList.input: - The first character that falls down loses

movesList.name: Aerial Wind
movesList.input: - Launchers cause you to float longer when airborne

movesList.name: Whirlwind
movesList.input: - You are constantly pushed in a wide circular motion

movesList.name: Separate
movesList.input: - You are constantly pulled away from opponent

movesList.name: Paralysis
movesList.input: - Guarding is disabled, and staggers are longer

movesList.name: All Guard Break
movesList.input: - Every hit has Guard Break properties

movesList.name: Slippery
movesList.input: - Makes floors slippery, only affects movement

movesList.name: Impregnable
movesList.input: - Opponent does not stagger & Quake effect occurs

movesList.name: Sacred Field
movesList.input: - Causes both Slippery and Cure effects

movesList.name: Loss
movesList.input: - Loss Conditions cause the game to end when they are reached.

movesList.name: Moving
movesList.input: - Before you reach the actual battlefield, you must select where

movesList.name: characters camped inside. Each of the characters
Battles
movesList.input: - Battles occur in two ways. Field Battles, occur when two (or

movesList.name: Revivals
movesList.input: - When one of your unit's losses a battle, it's sent to the

movesList.name: Flag
movesList.input: - Indicates which side of the opposition has control of this

movesList.name: Units
movesList.input: - the number marked with an "x" (such as "x5") indicates how many

movesList.name: Level
movesList.input: - Indicates the level of the stronghold. The higher the level the

movesList.input: - Indicates the type of battle effect(s) that will occur if a
